codeReview.summary: Pass. The current repo state has moved past the earlier simulated-success shortcut and broadened blocker-state assertions from commit c6ab2e2. The targeted UI tests now use seeded deterministic home data and strict visible UI assertions, so the current implementation no longer relies on shortcuts or broadened assertions to pass.

summary: Pass on current repo state. Earlier scrutiny concerns about `--simulate-home-ready` and blocker/loading-state acceptance applied to commit c6ab2e2, but the repo now uses `--seed-test-home`, keeps blocked states blocked in `HomeAccessFlowView`, and requires visible home-selection details in the targeted UI tests. The feature goal is effectively satisfied in the current revision without the earlier shortcuts.
